title: XYLim Function
parameters:
limit	Integer expression that specifies which limit to return.

1: Lower limit.

2: Upper limit.
description:
XYLim Function

XYLim Function

See_Also Example

Returns point data for either upper or lower limit of XYLim region.
see_also:
XYLim Statement

XYLim Function Example

P1 = XYLim(1)

P2 = XYLim(2)
